summary: Frontend-only testing of messaging features consolidation. All 10 test cases passed: login as admin, verified 'Чат персонала' button removed from sidebar, support tickets page with filters and placeholder, merchants pending page with placeholder, market applications page with placeholder, and staff messages page with all 3 tabs working.
critical_code_review_comments: SupportTickets component correctly implements action buttons: 'Запросить доказательства' and 'Решить тикет'
MerchantsPending component correctly implements action buttons: 'Запросить документы', 'Установить комиссию', 'Одобрить', 'Отклонить'
MarketApplications component correctly implements action buttons: 'Запросить детали', 'Установить комиссию', 'Одобрить', 'Отклонить'
Role colors implemented per specification: Admin/Owner=Red #EF4444, Moderators=Yellow #F59E0B, Support=Blue #3B82F6, Merchant=Orange #F97316, Shop=Purple #8B5CF6, User=White
Old 'Чат персонала' button has been completely removed from sidebar
Support tickets page has correct filters: Открыт, В работе, Решён, Закрыт, Все
All pages show correct placeholder messages when no item is selected
Minor: Console warning about unique 'key' prop in AdminMessagesToStaff - should add key to mapped elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: All messaging features consolidated and working. SupportTickets, MerchantsPending, and MarketApplications all have correct action buttons and role colors. Staff messages page has 3 tabs: General Chat, Direct Messages, Dispute Discussion. Old 'Чат персонала' sidebar button removed.

1_login_as_admin.details: Login with admin/000000 at /auth page successful, redirected to /admin

2_chat_personala_removed.details: 'Чат персонала' button has been removed from sidebar. Verified via sidebar text content check.

3_support_tickets_page.details: Navigation to /admin/support/tickets works correctly, data-testid='support-tickets' found

4_support_tickets_filters.details: All filters present: Открыт, В работе, Решён, Закрыт, Все

5_support_tickets_placeholder.details: 'Выберите тикет' placeholder displayed when no ticket selected

6_merchants_pending_page.details: Navigation to /admin/merchants/pending works correctly, data-testid='merchants-pending' found

8_market_applications_page.details: Navigation to /admin/market/applications works correctly, data-testid='market-applications' found

9_market_applications_placeholder.details: 'Выберите заявку для просмотра деталей и чата' placeholder displayed

10_staff_messages_tabs.details: All 3 tabs present and clickable: 'Общий чат', 'Личные сообщения', 'Обсуждение споров'
